name: webproject
description: html/css/javascript web project This web project is a spin on tinder but for networking and finding students that have the same interests or courses as you. Users should have the ability to login, then create a quick profile with a picture upload and text boxes for entering interests, courses, etc, then Another page for displaying common people, and ultimately a match page. Solves the age old problem of human connection- creating connections- perhaps re-connect is a cool play on words name for the project The intended user is anyone thats lonely and has access to a device, preferably college students Sign up, create profile, swipe on individual profiles, and connect.
